tasks.label: Bundle
tasks.command: cd drawdown_rust && wasm-pack build --target web --out-dir ../out/rust_wasm && cd .. && rm -f out/rust_wasm/.gitignore && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/monteCarlo.bundle.js monteCarloApp.tsx && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/monteCarlo.worker.js monteCarloWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/rustMonteCarloWorker.js rustMonteCarloWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/rustMonteCarloShardWorker.js rustMonteCarloShardWorker.ts && deno bundle --platform browser --output out/rustMonteCarloAnalysisWorker.js rustMonteCarloAnalysisWorker.ts
